Title: tsup DOM Clobbering vulnerability
Overview: A DOM Clobbering vulnerability in tsup v8.3.4 allows attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted script in the import.meta.url to document.currentScript in cjs_shims.js components

Title: ajv has ReDoS when using `$data` option
Overview: ajv (Another JSON Schema Validator) through version 8.17.1 is vulnerable to Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) when the `$data` option is enabled. The pattern keyword accepts runtime data vi

Title: brace-expansion: Zero-step sequence causes process hang and memory exhaustion

ID: A brace pattern with a zero step value (e.g.; `{1..2..0}`) causes the sequence generation loop to run indefinitely; making the process hang for seconds and allocate heaps of memory.
